關係代名詞: restrictive relative clause vs. nonrestrictive relative clause
one / some / most / all of which / whom (＋S)＋V⋯
分詞構句: 將副詞子句簡化的分詞構句
with + O + Ving / p.p. / adj. / prep.
關係副詞: S1＋V1＋if / whether / why / when / where / who / how / what＋S2＋V2
What S (Modal)＋do＋is / was (to) V 某人所應該／必須做的就是⋯
No matter what / which / who / how / where / when
強調、倒裝、被動句型: Never / Seldom / Hardly / Rarely / Barely＋be＋S / aux.＋S＋V....
特殊動詞: look / smell / taste / sound / feel＋adj. / like＋N
重要句型: 與現在事實相反的假設語氣
其他文法複習－不定詞: it 虛主詞的用法-it當虛受詞－it is adj. for人
其他文法複習－片語: The 比較級+S+V…, the 比較級+S+V…
